title: StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
